contents:
Require Import WildCat.Core WildCat.Equiv WildCat.Monoidal WildCat.Bifunctor
  WildCat.NatTrans WildCat.Opposite WildCat.Products.

(** * Monoids and Comonoids *)

(** Here we define a monoid internal to a monoidal category. Note that we don't actually need the full monoidal structure so we assume only the parts we need. This allows us to keep the definitions general between various flavours of monoidal category.

Many algebraic theories such as groups and rings may also be internalized, however these specifically require a cartesian monoidal structure. The theory of monoids however has no such requirement and can therefore be developed in much greater generality. This can be used to define a range of objects such as R-algebras, H-spaces, Hopf algebras and more. *)

(** * Monoid objects *)
(** An object [x] of [A] is a monoid object if it comes with the following data: *)
(** An object [x] of [A] is a commutative monoid object if: *)
(** A comonoid object is a monoid object in the opposite category. *)

Class IsComonoidObject (x : A)
    := ismonoid_comonoid_op :: IsMonoidObject (A:=A^op) tensor unit x.
(** We can build comonoid objects from the following data: *)

Definition Build_IsComonoidObject (x : A)
    (** A comultiplication map. *)
    (co_comult : x $-> tensor x x)
    (** A counit. *)
    (co_counit : x $-> unit)
    (** The comultiplication is coassociative. *)
    (co_coassoc : associator x x x $o fmap01 tensor x co_comult $o co_comult
        $== fmap10 tensor co_comult x $o co_comult)
    (** The comultiplication is left counital. *)
    (co_left_counit : left_unitor x $o fmap10 tensor co_counit x $o co_comult $== Id x)
    (** The comultiplication is right counital. *)
    (co_right_counit : right_unitor x $o fmap01 tensor x co_counit $o co_comult $== Id x)
    : IsComonoidObject x.

goals.conclusion: IsComonoidObject x

hypotheses.type:
Associator0 x x x $o fmap01 tensor x co_comult $o co_comult $==
fmap10 tensor co_comult x $o co_comult
LeftUnitor0 x $o fmap10 tensor co_counit x $o co_comult $== Id x
RightUnitor0 x $o fmap01 tensor x co_counit $o co_comult $== Id x

goals.conclusion: IsComonoidObject x

hypotheses.type:
Associator0 x x x $o fmap01 tensor x co_comult $o co_comult $==
fmap10 tensor co_comult x $o co_comult
LeftUnitor0 x $o fmap10 tensor co_counit x $o co_comult $== Id x
RightUnitor0 x $o fmap01 tensor x co_counit $o co_comult $== Id x

goals.conclusion: tensor x x $-> x

RightUnitor0 x $o fmap01 tensor x co_counit $o co_comult $== Id x

RightUnitor0 x $o fmap01 tensor x co_counit $o co_comult $== Id x

goals.conclusion:
?mo_mult $o fmap10 tensor ?mo_mult x $o associator_op x x x $==
?mo_mult $o fmap01 tensor x ?mo_mult

goals.conclusion:
fmap10 tensor co_counit x $o co_comult $==
cate_fun' x (tensor unit x)
  (cate_buildequiv' x (tensor unit x)
     (cate_inv' (tensor unit x) x (LeftUnitor0 x))
     (catie_adjointify (cate_inv' (tensor unit x) x (LeftUnitor0 x))
        (cate_fun' (tensor unit x) x (LeftUnitor0 x))
        (cate_issect' (tensor unit x) x (LeftUnitor0 x))
        (cate_isretr' (tensor unit x) x (LeftUnitor0 x)))) $o
Id x

contents:
Definition co_comult {x : A} `{!IsComonoidObject x} : x $-> tensor x x
   := mo_mult (A:=A^op) tensor (unit:=unit) (x:=x).

Definition co_counit {x : A} `{!IsComonoidObject x} : x $-> unit
    := mo_unit (A:=A^op) tensor (unit:=unit) (x:=x).

goals.conclusion:
Associator0 x x x $o fmap01 tensor x co_comult $o co_comult $==
fmap10 tensor co_comult x $o co_comult

Associator0 x x x $o fmap01 tensor x co_comult $o co_comult $==
fmap10 tensor co_comult x $o co_comult

Associator0 x x x $o (fmap01 tensor x co_comult $o co_comult) $==
fmap10 tensor co_comult x $o co_comult

fmap01 tensor x co_comult $o co_comult $==
(Associator0 x x x)^-1$ $o (fmap10 tensor co_comult x $o co_comult)

(Associator0 x x x)^-1$ $o (fmap10 tensor co_comult x $o co_comult) $==
fmap01 tensor x co_comult $o co_comult

contents:
Definition co_left_counit {x : A} `{!IsComonoidObject x}
    : left_unitor x $o fmap10 tensor co_counit x $o co_comult $== Id x.

goals.conclusion: LeftUnitor0 x $o fmap10 tensor co_counit x $o co_comult $== Id x
LeftUnitor0 x $o fmap10 tensor co_counit x $o co_comult $== Id x
LeftUnitor0 x $o (fmap10 tensor co_counit x $o co_comult) $== Id x
fmap10 tensor co_counit x $o co_comult $== (LeftUnitor0 x)^-1$ $o Id x
fmap10 tensor co_counit x $o co_comult $== (LeftUnitor0 x)^-1$

contents:
Definition co_right_counit {x : A} `{!IsComonoidObject x}
    : right_unitor x $o fmap01 tensor x co_counit $o co_comult $== Id x.

goals.conclusion: RightUnitor0 x $o fmap01 tensor x co_counit $o co_comult $== Id x
RightUnitor0 x $o fmap01 tensor x co_counit $o co_comult $== Id x
RightUnitor0 x $o (fmap01 tensor x co_counit $o co_comult) $== Id x
fmap01 tensor x co_counit $o co_comult $== (RightUnitor0 x)^-1$ $o Id x
fmap01 tensor x co_counit $o co_comult $== (RightUnitor0 x)^-1$

contents: (** A cocommutative comonoid objects is a commutative monoid object in the opposite category. *)

Class IsCocommutativeComonoidObject (x : A)
    := iscommuatativemonoid_cocomutativemonoid_op
      :: IsCommutativeMonoidObject (A:=A^op) tensor unit x.
(** We can build cocommutative comonoid objects from the following data: *)

Definition Build_IsCocommutativeComonoidObject (x : A)
    (** A comonoid. *)
    `{!IsComonoidObject x}
    (** Together with a proof of cocommutativity. *)
    (cco_cocomm : braid x x $o co_comult $== co_comult)
    : IsCocommutativeComonoidObject x.

goals.conclusion: IsCocommutativeComonoidObject x
IsCocommutativeComonoidObject x
IsMonoidObject tensor unit x
mo_mult tensor $o braiding_op x x $== mo_mult tensor
IsMonoidObject tensor unit x
mo_mult tensor $o braiding_op x x $== mo_mult tensor

contents:
#[export] Instance co_cco {x : A} `{!IsCocommutativeComonoidObject x}
    : IsComonoidObject x.

goals.conclusion: IsComonoidObject x
IsComonoidObject x

contents:
Definition cco_cocomm {x : A} `{!IsCocommutativeComonoidObject x}
    : braid x x $o co_comult $== co_comult.

goals.conclusion: Braiding0 x x $o co_comult $== co_comult
Braiding0 x x $o co_comult $== co_comult

contents: (** A comonoid object in [A^op] is a monoid object in [A]. *)

goals.conclusion: IsMonoidObject tensor unit x
IsMonoidObject tensor unit x
tensor x x $-> x
unit $-> x

?mo_mult $o fmap01 tensor x ?mo_mult
?mo_mult $o fmap10 tensor ?mo_unit x $== LeftUnitor0 x
?mo_mult $o fmap01 tensor x ?mo_unit $== RightUnitor0 x
tensor x x $-> x
unit $-> x

co_comult tensor unit $o fmap10 tensor (co_comult tensor unit) x $o
Associator0 x x x $==
co_comult tensor unit $o fmap01 tensor x (co_comult tensor unit)

co_comult tensor unit $o fmap10 tensor (co_comult tensor unit) x $==
co_comult tensor unit $o fmap01 tensor x (co_comult tensor unit) $o
(Associator0 x x x)^-1$

co_comult tensor unit $o fmap01 tensor x (co_comult tensor unit) $o
(Associator0 x x x)^-1$ $==
co_comult tensor unit $o fmap10 tensor (co_comult tensor unit) x

co_comult tensor unit $o fmap10 tensor (co_counit tensor unit) x $==
LeftUnitor0 x

co_comult tensor unit $o fmap10 tensor (co_counit tensor unit) x $==
Id x $o LeftUnitor0 x

co_comult tensor unit $o fmap10 tensor (co_counit tensor unit) x $o
(LeftUnitor0 x)^-1$ $== Id x

co_comult tensor unit $o
(fmap10 tensor (co_counit tensor unit) x $o (LeftUnitor0 x)^-1$) $== 
Id x

co_comult tensor unit $o fmap01 tensor x (co_counit tensor unit) $==
RightUnitor0 x

co_comult tensor unit $o fmap01 tensor x (co_counit tensor unit) $==
Id x $o RightUnitor0 x

co_comult tensor unit $o fmap01 tensor x (co_counit tensor unit) $o
(RightUnitor0 x)^-1$ $== Id x

co_comult tensor unit $o
(fmap01 tensor x (co_counit tensor unit) $o (RightUnitor0 x)^-1$) $== 
Id x

contents: (** A cocommutative comonoid object in [A^op] is a commutative monoid object in [A]. *)

goals.conclusion: IsCommutativeMonoidObject tensor unit x
IsCommutativeMonoidObject tensor unit x
IsMonoidObject tensor unit x
mo_mult tensor $o Braiding0 x x $== mo_mult tensor
IsMonoidObject tensor unit x
IsComonoidObject tensor unit x
mo_mult tensor $o Braiding0 x x $== mo_mult tensor

contents:
(** ** Monoid enrichment *)

(** A hom [x $-> y] in a cartesian category where [y] is a monoid object has the structure of a monoid. Equivalently, a hom [x $-> y] in a cartesian category where [x] is a comonoid object has the structure of a monoid. *)

Local Instance sgop_hom : SgOp (x $-> y)
      := fun f g => mo_mult cat_binprod $o cat_binprod_corec f g.
Local Instance monunit_hom : MonUnit (x $-> y) := mo_unit cat_binprod $o mor_terminal _ _.

goals.conclusion: Associative sgop_hom

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion: Associative sgop_hom

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion: sgop_hom f (sgop_hom g h) = sgop_hom (sgop_hom f g) h

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion:
mo_mult cat_binprod $o
cat_binprod_corec f (mo_mult cat_binprod $o cat_binprod_corec g h) =
mo_mult cat_binprod $o
cat_binprod_corec (mo_mult cat_binprod $o cat_binprod_corec f g) h

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion:
mo_mult cat_binprod $o
cat_binprod_corec f (mo_mult cat_binprod $o cat_binprod_corec g h) $==
mo_mult cat_binprod $o
cat_binprod_corec (mo_mult cat_binprod $o cat_binprod_corec f g) h

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion:
mo_mult cat_binprod $o
(fmap01 (fun x0 y0 : A => cat_binprod x0 y0) y (mo_mult cat_binprod) $o
 cat_binprod_corec f (cat_binprod_corec g h)) $==
mo_mult cat_binprod $o
cat_binprod_corec (mo_mult cat_binprod $o cat_binprod_corec f g) h

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion:
mo_mult cat_binprod $o
fmap01 (fun x0 y0 : A => cat_binprod x0 y0) y (mo_mult cat_binprod) $o
cat_binprod_corec f (cat_binprod_corec g h) $==
mo_mult cat_binprod $o
cat_binprod_corec (mo_mult cat_binprod $o cat_binprod_corec f g) h

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion:
mo_mult cat_binprod $o fmap10 cat_binprod (mo_mult cat_binprod) y $o
associator_cat_binprod y y y $o cat_binprod_corec f (cat_binprod_corec g h) $==
mo_mult cat_binprod $o
cat_binprod_corec (mo_mult cat_binprod $o cat_binprod_corec f g) h

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion:
mo_mult cat_binprod $o fmap10 cat_binprod (mo_mult cat_binprod) y $o
associator_cat_binprod y y y $o cat_binprod_corec f (cat_binprod_corec g h) $==
mo_mult cat_binprod $o
(fmap10 (fun x0 y0 : A => cat_binprod x0 y0) (mo_mult cat_binprod) y $o
 cat_binprod_corec (cat_binprod_corec f g) h)

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion:
associator_cat_binprod y y y $o cat_binprod_corec f (cat_binprod_corec g h) $==
cat_binprod_corec (cat_binprod_corec f g) h

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

contents: Local Instance leftidentity_hom : LeftIdentity sgop_hom mon_unit.

cat_binprod_corec (mor_terminal x I) f $== f

goals.conclusion:
{|
  trans_nattrans :=
    fun a : A => right_unitor_binprod I a $o symmetricbraiding_binprod I a;
  is1natural_nattrans :=
    Build_Is1Natural
      (fun a : A => right_unitor_binprod I a $o symmetricbraiding_binprod I a)
      (fun (a b : A) (f0 : a $-> b) =>
       Square.vconcat (braid_nat_r f0)
         (is1natural_natequiv (right_unitor_binprod I) a b f0))
|} y $o cat_binprod_corec (mor_terminal x I) f $== f

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion:
right_unitor_binprod I y $o symmetricbraiding_binprod I y $o
cat_binprod_corec (mor_terminal x I) f $== f

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion: right_unitor_binprod I y $== ?Goal0

goals.conclusion: ?Goal $o cat_binprod_corec (mor_terminal x I) f $== f

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion: cat_pr1 $o symmetricbraiding_binprod I y $== ?Goal

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : A, IsHSet (x0 $-> y0)

goals.conclusion: ?Goal $o cat_binprod_corec (mor_terminal x I) f $== f
